name: Buang Ruk Satan
original_name: บ่วงรักซาตาน
overview: Hemarat tries to buy Chompoonit’s family riding park to build a shopping center, but Nit refuses and skillfully thwarts his schemes. As their high-stakes business rivalry intensifies, an unseen competitor lurks in the shadows. When Hem falls for Nit, he abandons the battle and joins forces with her, turning rivalry into partnership.

trailers.title: บ่วงรักซาตาน เร็วๆ นี้ | Ch3Thailand
